title: Death of employer or of employee
content:
Part I of the Third Schedule shall have effect in relation to the 
death of an employer; and Part II of that Schedule shall have effect 
in relation to the death of an employee.
[cf. 1965 c. 62 s. 23 U.K.]

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
